description: Style NoteYou don't need to go overboard on bling to standout. This casual purse from baggit could easily do the trick. The unique design of this purse gives it an edgy look and it has enough space inside to accommodate your items. So, all you women out there who need to store all your important cards, papers and carry currency notes securely, here's the best bet. Product Details Black purse crafted in synthetic shimmer fabric Pleated design on the flap with magnetic press button flap closure One main compartment with three interior slots and one zippered pocket Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 12 cm Width: 25 cm
